highlights: Organizes long-lived knowledge into active, archived, and clipping lanes to control information entropy.
Adds scripted vault maintenance and backup operations for sustainable note growth.
Designed as an operational knowledge system, not just a note collection.
impact: Improved retrieval speed and long-term maintainability for high-volume notes, research captures, and project memory.
one_liner: Knowledge operations vault built on Obsidian for notes, clippings, archives, and durable project memory.
problem: As notes and research scale, retrieval and maintenance degrade without explicit structure and lifecycle controls.
solution: Implemented vault architecture and automation scripts for organizing, pruning, archiving, and preserving critical context.
title: Obsidian Knowledge Ops
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
